chatgpt.description: Useful for many productivity related task (copywriting, user persona generation etc.)

adobe_firefly.description: Text 2 Image tool, interesting for concept design brainstorms

huemint.description: Create color swatch and see their direct application on various format and mediums.

icolorpalette.description: Explore trendy swatch and generate color swatch.

randoma11y.description: Generate random palettes based on Accessibility ratio.

coolors.description: Generate color swatch and explore harmonious palettes.

color_designer.description: Collection of useful tools for color generation (shades, tint).

the_component_gallery.description: Collection of Components semantic and Design Systems curation.

typescale.description: Generate easily font scales for design systems.

pousse_ta_fonte.description: Collection of paid and free to use Typeface Foundries.

google_fonts.description: Collection of free to use Typefaces.

fontshare.description: Collection of free to use Typefaces.

velvetyne.description: Collection of eccentric display Typefaces (most shall be free to use).

use_modify.description: Collection of eccentric display Typefaces (most shall be free to use).

simple_icons.description: Collection of SVG logos along with the brand primary color.

sargam_icons.description: Icon Library with style declination (outlined, shaded, solid).

unsplash.description: Collection of free to use pictures, mostly focused on real life photography.

pixabay.description: Collection of free to use pictures.

pexels.description: Collection of free to use pictures and videos.
